clientName.description: ET-Client-Name header value sent to Entur API. Defaults to 'openclaw-entur'.

defaultStopId.description: Default stop ID for quick departure lookups (e.g. 'NSR:StopPlace:58366').

clientName.label: Client Name
clientName.help: Identifier sent to Entur API (e.g. 'mycompany-myapp'). Defaults to 'openclaw-entur'.

defaultStopId.label: Default Stop
defaultStopId.help: Your home stop ID. Use entur_search_stops to find it (e.g. 'NSR:StopPlace:58366' for Jernbanetorget).
